name: Lemon Fruitcake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 325 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. In a large bowl, cream together sugar and butter for several minutes until light and fluffy.
3. Beat in eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
4. Gradually add baking soda, lemon extract, and flour, blending thoroughly.
5. Gently fold in the fruit (raisins, pineapple, and cherries) and chopped pecans.
6. Pour the batter into a greased cake pan, spreading evenly.
7. Bake for 1-1/2 hours until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Remove from the oven and let cool before serving.
